stories.headline: We asked you to send us dad jokes. Here are 39 to delight and annoy you. - The Washington Post
stories.summary: Yes, they are corny. But dad jokes are also a way for people — even those who aren’t actual fathers — to connect and build social bonds.

stories.headline: Low-key funeral held for giant of the art world David Hockney - BBC
stories.summary: The artist, who passed away at his home in London earlier this month, requested just his partner and great-nephew attend.

stories.headline: SPOILER: Former WWE World Champion Arrives To AAA - Fightful

stories.headline: William marks 44th birthday as royals celebrate Father's Day - BBC
stories.summary: The Princess of Wales and the couple's children share message for "the best papa in the world".
